feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: AS2 Partner ID Reuse Across Multiple Partner Profiles in SAP CPI TPM
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I’m fairly new to SAP CPI Trading Partner Management (TPM) and I’ve run into a situation I don’t know how to solve.

  • I have 10 partners who all use the same AS2 Partner ID (SIBSERVICE1005), the same AS2 connection, and the same certificate.

  • In TPM, the AS2 Partner ID must be unique per Partner Profile, so CPI doesn’t allow me to assign SIBSERVICE1005 to more than one profile.

  • If I change the AS2 ID to keep them unique, the actual process becomes incorrect, because all partners technically use the same AS2 ID and certificate in reality.

Since I’m still exploring TPM, I’d really appreciate guidance from the community:

  1. How can I configure TPM so that multiple partners can share the same AS2 ID and certificate?

  2. Is the recommended approach to create one Partner Profile with the shared AS2 ID and then manage partner‑specific logic at the Agreement level?

  3. Are there any best practices for handling certificate reuse across multiple agreements or partners in this scenario?

Any guidance or examples from your experience would be very helpful.

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: SAP HCM to Third Party Integration (LIve)
entry.content: SAP HCM master data needs to be updated in our third-party systems.  How can this be achieved in real time? We are not able to find any time stamp or event triggered at the time of data change/update in infotypes? What is the SAP recommended approach for real-time HR master data update propagation to external systems? We are unable to find an SAP note.

entry.title: Disabling Father's and Husband's field from dependent
entry.content: In the dependent , We are getting fathers and husbands name from personnel information. Is there any way to remove only these two  fields from the dependent.

entry.title: Issue on one job code mapping with multiple job roles.
entry.content:
Hi Team,
We have a query regarding JPB - job code mapping to multiple roles. we were configuring Job Code Association with Multiple Job Roles, followed the process which is mentioned in SAP Notes. WE created a custom field as custom_09  in manage business configuration and making it editable then saving it we are getting the error and same in configure object Definition. Please check the attached screenshot reagarding error.

entry.title: Support for Partner Directory On Edge
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We thought the long awaited support for partner directory on Edge is finally delivered , below was the announcement for reference .  This community blog is offline since friday.

Not sure if the functionality was not released yet or what happened

https://community.sap.com/t5/integration-blog-posts/run-pipeline-for-cloud-integration-on-edge-integration-cell-with-partner/ba-p/14369882

entry.title: Issues with case sensitivity with jdbc batch operations when writing to SAP Hana Cloud DB.
entry.content:
Hello.  When using batch operations of an insert statement my column name is all lower case 'flowname' but the error comes back as "FLOWNAME" not found in your database.

This is the content modifier.  Flowname is all lower case.

This is the error, saying FLOWNAME is not found.

This is the database shema, showing the column is all lower case. 

I'm not sure why my content modifier is correct with all lower 'flowname' but in the runtime this fails over to all upper case 'FLOWNAME'.  Then the error make sense because SAP Hana Cloud DB is case sensitive.  Q - how do maintain my xml element called flowname be all lower case?  Is there an setting i have missed or is my batch operation wrong?

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/batch-payload-and-operation

Thanks.

entry.title: Events via Cloud Integration
entry.content:
hi all,

we have two cases where we are sending Events fe.

entry.title: Capability of Integration Suite to handle large amount of requests
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I have a question regarding capability of Integration Suite to handle a large amount or requests per second. I need to process around 25k requests for billing, so IS sends to ERP which handles this process. But I need to control this flow, retries, exeptions, etc. by Integration Suite.

Can IS handle lots of request/second? I need around 14.2 request/min. For each request I need traceability. Does IS manage something like a staging table, or how does it process each request, exceptions, retries, etc?  

Suppose there is something like 40k transactions I need to process per day. Do you think IS could handle this volume?

entry.title: Payload Corruption while posting pdf attachment via APIM.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need to post attachments (PDF/TXT), from a 3rd party to S4 API "API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV" via APIM, 

While creating the request to fetch token the original payload in body is getting corrupted and not reaching to S4.

I have tried storing the payload in a variable and used that to post the request still the payload is not reaching S4.

API Management

entry.title: could not fetch content packages in SAP Integration Suite under design mode.
entry.content: I am experiencing an error message "could not fetch content packages" in SAP Integration Suite when using design mode. I need assistance to understand and resolve this issue.

entry.title: Azure OAuth Integration Failure
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are encountering issues while configuring OAuth 2.0 authentication for Microsoft Graph API integration in SAP Cloud Integration (CPI).

The integration is intended to enable reading emails from an Office365 mailbox using Azure AD–based authentication (Client Credentials / OAuth 2.0).

PFA the error screenshot for the same.

Regards,
Yashashree

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4HANA on-premises with ActiveMQ on-premises using Edge Integration Cell
entry.content:
Hi,

We work with a private on-premises version of SAP S/4HANA and we would like to exchange events between that instance and some ActiveMQ queues (on-premises too).

The condition is that the messages/events stay on-premises and don't go outside on any hyperscalers' infrastructure.

We have a Kubernetes infrastructure on-premises too.

It seems that with such landscape it should be possible to configure a runtime with Edge Integration Cell on-premises, add a JSM or AMQP Adapter in the design of the intregration and then exchange events between the EIC and SAP S/4HANA.

Is it correct ?

Thanks

entry.title: Reprocessing Retry Messages in SAP CPI
entry.content:
We observed that when the SAP Cloud Connector becomes unavailable, messages sent from SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) to the on-premise system fail and are moved to the retry queue based on the configured retry mechanism.

Once the Cloud Connector is restored and connectivity is re-established, the failed/retried messages can be reprocessed from CPI Monitoring.

entry.title: Reprocessing of Retried Messages in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

whenever we have the failure of sender system massages not being delivered and messages failed in SAP CPI can you please let us know the option of failed message in SAP CPI

entry.title: SAP guide for release pipeline for SAP IS to KAFKA
entry.content:
Hello SAP, 

We are currently trying to create an integration between SAP IS and KAFKA through KaTe adapter. We would like to create release pipeline which is backed by automated unit tests. We are ok to leverage gitlab.  

Can you please help us to know more about the process of if SAP IS allows this type of release pipeline or not.

Thanks,

Dhruba

entry.title: How to Configure OAuth 2.0 Authentication Between SAP Integration Suite (CPI) & S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I am working on an integration scenario where SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration/CPI) needs to consume APIs from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using OAuth 2.0 authentication.

Scenario

My requirement is to retrieve Sales Order data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition into SAP CPI through an iFlow. Instead of using Basic Authentication, I would like to use OAuth 2.0 for secure communication between CPI and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

What configurations are required in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Integration Suite?

I am looking for guidance on the complete setup required on both SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Integration Suite to enable CPI to securely consume Sales Order data using OAuth 2.0 authentication.

Any documentation references, implementation experiences, or configuration examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Value Mapping Migration from SAP PI to SAP CPI
entry.content:
We observed an issue during the migration of Value Mapping from SAP PI to SAP CPI. The source and target fields appear to have been interchanged after migration, resulting in incorrect value mapping behavior.

Could you please help us investigate and resolve this issue? We would appreciate your guidance on identifying the root cause and correcting the source-to-target mapping configuration.

entry.title: Integration Suite Service Plan Issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We are encountering an issue in our integration suite.

We are trying to export a package from our Production environment and importing it in our test environment to perform some tests.

However, we are getting the following error message:

Error: Import failed. You are attempting to import an artifact type that is not supported in your current service plan. 

 

As per our understanding, we are currently on SAP Standard Edition.

Integration Suiteintegrationsuitesuccessfactors_edition2 units(none)

entry.title: Roles For Adding Capabilities in CPI System
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Please suggest relevant roles for adding the below capabilities in CPI system.

  • API Management
  • Open Connectors
  • Integration Advisor
  • Integration Assessment

Also attaching same document for reference

entry.title: Integration Suite - UNA segment is not generating for the receiver payload
entry.content:
We are currently working with SAP IDoc to EDIFACT-related maps in mapping services. We used the Standard Message Definition (D.01B S3 ORDRSP/DESADV/INVOIC) for the mapping. However, during testing, we noticed that there was no UNA in the output.
We would like to inquire:

  1. Is UNA auto-generated by default? If so, why is it not being generated with our mapping services?
  2. If UNA is not auto-generated, is there any way to enable auto-generation?

 We simply want to include (UNA:+.?*') at the beginning of the output.
